name: The Cookieverse Official
overview: Demir Basceri, also known as the ‘Cookie King,’ must lock in to reclaim his prime. But locking in isn’t easy — it comes at a price. Between brutal hill sprints, unexpected lemonade spills, and a full descent into melt-maxxing madness, the Cookieverse is on the brink. Now, it’s up to one man to hold the dough together… before it all crumbles.
